title: Khejroli Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khejroli with a Z-Score of +6.57. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10, classified as CRITICAL.
body:
The current weather conditions in Khejroli are extremely hot and dry, with an Umidita of 15% and Vento of 14.8 km/h. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 22.0 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The extreme heat wave is expected to continue, with temperatures remaining high for the next few days, posing a significant threat to the city's residents and infrastructure.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Khejroli immediately.
